adoption.finding: The WebDX/WebFeature counter 'ContainerQueries' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 19) measured 22.9041% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2024-06-04 with 580 data points. Mapping confidence: declared-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the ContainerQueries family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 145 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.

endUserImpact.finding: End-user impact not analyzed in this report.
